title: Vera Bradley Announces Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2025 Results
text:
Vera Bradley Q3 Fiscal 2025 Earnings Summary

Financial Results (Third Quarter Ended November 2, 2024)
Revenue & Loss:
- Consolidated net revenues: $80.6 million (down 30% from $115.0 million prior year)
- Net loss: $12.8 million, or ($0.46) per diluted share
- Non-GAAP net loss: $7.5 million, or ($0.27) per diluted share

Segment Performance:
- Vera Bradley Direct revenues: $52.5 million (down 27.4%)
- Vera Bradley Indirect revenues: $18.0 million (down 27.9%)
- Pura Vida revenues: $10.1 million (down 42.9%)

Nine-Month Results (Through November 2, 2024)
- Consolidated net revenues: $272.0 million (down 19.4% from $337.5 million)
- Net loss: $15.2 million, or ($0.52) per diluted share
- Non-GAAP net loss: $10.2 million, or ($0.35) per diluted share

FY2025 Guidance (52-week year ending February 1, 2025)
- Consolidated net revenues: approximately $385 million
- Gross profit percentage: approximately 52.5%
- SG&A expense: approximately $213 million
- Operating loss: approximately ($9) million
- Diluted EPS: approximately ($0.25)
- End-of-year cash balance: approximately $35 million

CEO Commentary
CEO Jackie Ardrey noted the extremely challenging Q3 during Project Restoration, stating the company is seeing steady progress and experiencing trendline improvement in Q4 across most channels.
